creator: kevin@insidesystems.net
text:
The build fails almost immediately, while in the ghc-6.6-boot code.

===>  Configuring for ghc-nox11-6.6
checking build system type... amd64-unknown-freebsd6.2
checking host system type... amd64-unknown-freebsd6.2
checking target system type... amd64-unknown-freebsd6.2
Unrecognised platform: amd64-unknown-freebsd6.2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/lang/ghc.

How-To-Repeat: build ghc-6.6 from ports, on an amd64 machine.
